siteConfig.siteDescription: Frontend developer specializing in building responsive e-commerce platforms and AI-powered healthcare SaaS applications with Next.js, React, and modern technologies.

personal.name: Devansh Agarwal
personal.title: Frontend Developer | Next.js & React Specialist
personal.tagline: Building responsive, accessible web applications with Next.js, React, and TypeScript
personal.bio: Frontend-focused developer with hands-on experience building production-grade applications including e-commerce platforms (Droid Store) and AI-powered healthcare SaaS (AlivePost). Proficient in modern frameworks like Next.js 16, React 19, and component libraries like Radix UI and shadcn/ui. Currently studying Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology at Dr. A. P. J. Abdul Kalam Technical University, Lucknow (2022-2026).

timeline.title: Bachelor of Technology, Information Technology
timeline.institution: Dr. A. P. J. Abdul Kalam Technical University
timeline.description: Currently pursuing a comprehensive degree in Information Technology with focus on web development, data structures, and modern frameworks.

timeline.title: Droid Store (E-commerce Platform)
timeline.description: Built a fully responsive e-commerce storefront using Next.js 14 with TypeScript, featuring server-side rendering for improved SEO and fast initial page loads.

timeline.title: AlivePost (Healthcare SaaS Frontend)
timeline.description: Production-grade AI-powered healthcare SaaS frontend focused on post-discharge patient care using Next.js 16 and React 19.
highlights: React Hook Form with Zod Validation

timeline.title: Front-end Web Development Experience
timeline.description: Continuous learning and application of modern web development technologies and best practices in real-world projects.

memberships.name: Dr. A. P. J. Abdul Kalam Technical University

services.title: Next.js Development
services.description: Building modern web applications with Next.js 14 & 16, featuring App Router, server-side rendering for SEO, and optimized performance. Expertise in both versions.

services.title: React.js & React 19
services.description: Creating interactive, component-based user interfaces with React and latest React 19 features. Focus on reusable components and best practices.

services.title: E-Commerce Development
services.description: Building fully responsive e-commerce platforms with dynamic product listings, variant selection, cart functionality, and optimized images. Production-ready solutions.

services.title: Healthcare SaaS Frontend
services.description: Developing enterprise-grade healthcare applications with accessibility compliance, secure form handling with Zod validation, and smooth animations.

services.title: UI Component Development
services.description: Creating scalable, accessible UI components using Radix UI primitives and shadcn/ui. Modular design system implementation for enterprise applications.

services.title: Animation & Interactions
services.description: Implementing polished animations and smooth scroll interactions using Framer Motion and Lenis for enterprise-quality user experiences.

testimonials.name: Healthcare SaaS Founder
testimonials.text: Devansh built the frontend for AlivePost with exceptional quality. His understanding of React 19 and component design was crucial to our product launch. His attention to UX details is impressive.

testimonials.name: E-commerce Project Lead
testimonials.text: The Droid Store platform Devansh created was fully responsive and optimized. Server-side rendering with Next.js 14 improved our SEO significantly. Excellent frontend implementation.

testimonials.name: Tech Mentor
testimonials.text: Devansh demonstrates deep understanding of modern web technologies. His code is clean, well-structured, and follows best practices. Great potential for a young developer.

testimonials.name: Project Collaborator
testimonials.text: Working with Devansh on frontend components was seamless. He leverages Radix UI and shadcn/ui effectively, and his Tailwind CSS skills are top-notch. Highly recommended.

publications.title: Droid Store - E-commerce Platform with Next.js 14
AlivePost - Healthcare SaaS Frontend with React 19

blogPosts.title: Building Responsive E-commerce with Next.js 14
blogPosts.summary: Deep dive into building Droid Store - a fully responsive e-commerce platform using Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS with server-side rendering.
